figure.head: 84號窟。2010年拍攝
Cave 84, neighboring cave 82; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Description
div.p: Empty, entrance 225 × 160 cm , depth in the middle/center 165 cm, width of wall c 250, leaning forward. Trapezoidal ground plan as cave 81. Twin caves, unusual ground plan.
Diagonal: from right front to left rear corner e–f, 254 cm; and from corner d–e to entrance f 243 cm.

Two caves are twin caves because of gable and ground plan. Niche with a group of five figures of high quality, a Shakyamuni Buddha seated on his lion’s throne, two disciples, one carrying a book (Ananda?) and two lokapala.
Below the niche is a dedicatory inscription with date, see Lei Yuhua.

figure.head: 84號窟。2010年拍攝
Cave 84 and its environs; photograph taken in 2010

note.p: The editors of the Chengdu Municipal Institute of Cultural Relics and Archaeology provide a detailed description of the cave, including measurements.
